body:
DIRECTIVE: tungsten-forge PASS 3. Base: SLS(30)/9.44 (your compiled build). Target: SLS(31). This is the pass that turns "more tests" into more intelligence -- by fixing the overfit at its root and forbidding the failure mode that caused it. Obey tungsten-forge v2.0 throughout; every code change needs a filed Change Warrant with a numeric prediction FIRST.

== THE MANDATE (Manuel) ==
The system must learn correlations and relationships across ALL available information regardless of market complexity, with roughly 10x more testing, while correcting the overfit and every other known defect. CRITICAL FRAMING you must internalise and encode: MORE TESTS ONLY HELP WHERE DATA CAN SUPPORT THEM. Running 10x more searches against the same underpowered cells does not find correlations -- it manufactures false ones faster. The intelligence increase comes from testing CORRECTLY at scale (answerable, powered, orthogonal, REPLICATED), not from raw combo count. Proven this pass: searching 562,500 combos against ONE split, the luckiest pure-noise combo shows +0.188R of fake edge -- that IS the -19 to -44pp holdout collapse. Do not repeat it at 10x volume.

== W#10 (P0): REPLACE PHASE 3B SEARCH WITH WALK-FORWARD REPLICATION ==
This is hypothesis #3 from pass 2 and the shared root of all 9 regime overfits. File the warrant, predict the effect, then:
 - Split each regime's history into 3-5 DISJOINT time windows (never shuffled; walk-forward, oldest->newest).
 - A weight combination is ACCEPTED only if it beats the equal-weight baseline on the orthogonal metric in a MAJORITY of windows AND its out-of-window mean is positive. A combo that wins on one window and dies on the next is a fitted artefact -- reject it.
 - Verified math to encode: 1 window suppresses nothing (p=0.50 a noise combo survives); 5 windows make a noise combo 32x harder to survive by chance (p=0.031). Replication is the filter.
 - Apply a selection penalty sized to the search count: the acceptance threshold rises with log(combos tested) (a Bonferroni-style haircut). If 562,500 combos are searched, the bar must clear ~0.188R of expected best-of-K noise -- otherwise the "winner" is luck.
 - PREDICT in the warrant: holdout WR collapse should shrink from -19..-44pp toward single digits; more regimes should retain learned weights instead of falling back to equal.

== W#11 (P0): THE 10x TEST BUDGET, ALLOCATED HONESTLY ==
Increase distinct tests ~10x, but every test must be answerable, powered (n>=500, MDE reported), orthogonal (never validate a rule against a label from its own inputs), and consequential. Allocate the budget to RELATIONSHIPS, not just repetition:
 - Single-voice IC per regime (existing) -- but only on n>=500 cells.
 - PAIRWISE component correlations within each regime: does momentum+structure together predict when neither does alone? Report the interaction IC vs the sum of marginals.
 - LAGGED / cross-regime relationships: does regime-7 (Building Momentum) at bar t predict regime-0 (Strong Bull) profitability at t+k? This is the "cause and effect pattern" Manuel wants -- transition-conditioned edge.
 - Cross-SESSION and cross-HTF conditioning, collapsed until n>=500.
 - EVERY test gets a null-surrogate control (phase-destroyed) so the apparatus noise floor (+/-0.03R at n~3800) is subtracted before any claim.
 - Pre-register each test's n_required and decision rule in the ledger. A test that cannot resolve its effect is NOT run.

== W#12: CORRELATION INTEGRITY ==
When learning relationships across many components, guard against the same noise-becomes-conviction failure at the PAIR level:
 - Shrink every pairwise/lagged correlation by significance (same 1/sqrt(n-3) SE machinery, 2-SE floor).
 - A relationship must REPLICATE across walk-forward windows to be stored, exactly like a weight.
 - Store surviving relationships in a new provenance table in forge_ledger.json (which pair/lag/regime, IC, n, windows-survived, null-subtracted effect).

== CARRY THE STILL-OPEN HARD GATES (from pass 2, never yet run for real) ==
 - Stage 6 NULL-GHOST: run the full ghost pipeline on phase-destroyed AND sign-flipped surrogates of the actual instrument bars. Expect meanR ~ 0, p>0.01. If the ghost profits from noise, HALT -- every downstream number is void.
 - Stage 6 PARITY: prove calibration/ghost/live invoke the SAME function for scoring, TP/SL, sizing, gates. 500-bar live-sync replay must match bar-for-bar. A mismatch is P0.
 - Also verify W#9 (n<500 floor, shipped in SLS30) actually changed regime 3/4/8 behaviour on a real calibration -- it is still PENDING_BACKTEST.

== CORRECT EVERY OTHER KNOWN DEFECT ==
Sweep the full discrepancy register (8 classes) across all subsystems. Known-open items: the remaining Point*N sites not yet converted; any clamp with >5% bind-rate (SATURATION); any gate with <0.5% or >95% fire-rate. Each fix = its own warrant + prediction.

== SEQUENCE & RULES ==
Run the 11-stage sequence. Stage -1 read the ledger; Stage 0 re-profile the attached instrument; interleave Warrant->Reinforce->Harden->Validate->Compile per subsystem, never batched. Relay checkpoints after W#10, W#11, and Stage 6 (the hard gates). Consolidated report at Stage 8 with the full competence vector and prediction-MAE trend -- state plainly whether the agent got smarter this pass and by which metric.

HARD RULES: no forcing a passing calibration out of data that refuses (Prohibition #2 -- a STAND DOWN is correct behaviour, report it). Ship refutations. No absolute magic numbers. Live attach still requires Manuel's explicit go-ahead after he reads real numbers. No autonomous re-arm loops. If the null-ghost or parity gate fails, HALT and report -- do not proceed to a ghost verdict on a broken apparatus.

The goal is not 10x more answers. It is 10x more QUESTIONS that are worth asking -- each one powered, replicated, and null-controlled -- so that the relationships TUNGSTEN keeps are real enough to survive a market it has never seen.
